member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Api.QualityGateController
member.summary: API controller for Quality Gate filtered playback info. Uses the authenticated caller's identity — no caller-supplied userId.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Api.QualityGateController.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.ILibraryManager,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.IMediaSourceManager,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Api.QualityGateController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Api.QualityGateController.GetFilteredMediaSources(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets filtered media sources for an item based on the authenticated caller's quality policy.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Api.QualityGateController.GetDefaultSource(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the default (preferred) media source for an item based on the caller's policy. Returns the first allowed source.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.Policies
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of quality policies.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.UserPolicies
member.summary: Gets or sets the user-to-policy assignments (overrides).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DefaultPolicyId
member.summary: Gets or sets the default policy ID applied to all users. Users with specific assignments in UserPolicies override this. Empty string means no default policy (full access for all).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DefaultIntroVideoPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the default intro video path for users without a policy-specific intro. Example: "/media/intros/GeiserLand.mp4"

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy
member.summary: Defines a quality restriction policy.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique policy identifier.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the policy name (e.g., "Low Bitrate Only", "Transcoded Files").

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the policy.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy.AllowedFilenamePatterns
member.summary: Gets or sets regex patterns matched against filenames. Files whose filename matches at least one pattern are allowed. Example: ["- 720p", "- 1080p"] to only allow those versions.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy.BlockedFilenamePatterns
member.summary: Gets or sets regex patterns matched against filenames. Files whose filename matches any pattern are blocked. Example: ["- 2160p", "- 4K"] to block UHD versions.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this policy is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy.BlockedMessageHeader
member.summary: Gets or sets the header text shown when playback is blocked.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy.BlockedMessageText
member.summary: Gets or sets the message shown when playback is blocked.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy.BlockedMessageTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout in milliseconds for the blocked message.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy.IntroVideoPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to a custom intro video for users under this policy. If empty, uses Jellyfin's default intro video (if configured in plugin intros). Example: "/media/intros/720p-intro.mp4"

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy.FallbackTranscode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to fall back to server-side transcoding when no media source matches the allowed filename patterns. When enabled, instead of blocking playback, the original file is served with direct play/stream disabled, forcing Jellyfin to transcode.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.UserPolicyAssignment
member.summary: Assigns a policy to a user (overrides the default policy).

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.UserPolicyAssignment.FullAccessPolicyId
member.summary: Special policy ID that indicates full access (no restrictions).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.UserPolicyAssignment.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin user ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.UserPolicyAssignment.Username
member.summary: Gets or sets the username (for display purposes).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.UserPolicyAssignment.PolicyId
member.summary: Gets or sets the policy ID assigned to this user. Use "__FULL_ACCESS__" to give unrestricted access. Empty string means use the default policy.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Filters.MediaSourceResultFilter
member.summary:
Two-phase MVC filter that forces Jellyfin's transcoding pipeline to build proper TranscodingUrls when fallback-transcode is needed, and removes blocked MediaSources from API responses before serialization.
Phase 1 (IAsyncResourceFilter): runs BEFORE model binding. For PlaybackInfo requests where fallback is needed, modifies the query string to set enableDirectPlay=false and enableDirectStream=false. Jellyfin's StreamBuilder then chooses Transcode and builds proper TranscodingUrls — simply flipping flags on the result doesn't work because TranscodingUrl remains null when StreamBuilder originally chose DirectPlay.
Phase 2 (IAsyncResultFilter): runs BEFORE serialization. Filters blocked sources from responses, hides fully-blocked items from listings, and skips filtering for PlaybackInfo requests where the pipeline was already forced into transcode mode.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Filters.MediaSourceResultFilter.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Filters.MediaSourceResultFilter},MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.ILibraryManager,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.IMediaSourceManager)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Filters.MediaSourceResultFilter.OnResourceExecutionAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.ResourceExecutingContext,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.ResourceExecutionDelegate)
member.summary:
Phase 1: Resource filter — runs BEFORE model binding. For PlaybackInfo POST requests where all sources are blocked by the user's policy and FallbackTranscode is enabled, modifies the request body to strip DirectPlayProfiles from the DeviceProfile. This forces Jellyfin's StreamBuilder to choose Transcode and build proper TranscodingUrls.
In Jellyfin 10.11+ the enableDirectPlay/enableDirectStream query parameters are obsolete and ignored — the DeviceProfile in the POST body is the sole driver of the direct-play vs transcode decision.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Filters.MediaSourceResultFilter.OnResultExecutionAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.ResultExecutingContext,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.ResultExecutionDelegate)
member.summary: Phase 2: Result filter — runs BEFORE response serialization. Filters blocked sources, hides fully-blocked items, and skips filtering for PlaybackInfo requests where the pipeline was already forced into transcode mode.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Filters.MediaSourceResultFilter.TryForceTranscodeBodyAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.String)
member.summary:
Checks if the current PlaybackInfo POST request needs fallback transcoding, and if so, modifies the request body to strip DirectPlayProfiles from the DeviceProfile. This runs BEFORE model binding, so Jellyfin's StreamBuilder receives a DeviceProfile with no DirectPlay options and is forced to choose Transcode, building proper TranscodingUrls that the client needs to initiate server-side transcoding.
In Jellyfin 10.11+ the enableDirectPlay query parameter is obsolete and ignored — the DeviceProfile in the POST body is the sole driver of the playback decision.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Filters.MediaSourceResultFilter.BuildDefaultTranscodingProfiles
member.summary: Builds a default set of TranscodingProfiles for the fallback DeviceProfile. Covers HLS video (h264/aac) and audio-only (aac) which are universally supported.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Filters.MediaSourceResultFilter.ExtractItemIdFromPath(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the item GUID from a URL path like /Items/{guid}/PlaybackInfo.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Filters.MediaSourceResultFilter.ShouldHideItem(MediaBrowser.Model.Dto.BaseItemDto,Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy,System.Guid)
member.summary: Determines if an item should be hidden from listings because all its media sources are blocked. When MediaSources is populated on the DTO, filters them in-place and returns true if none remain. When MediaSources is null (listing endpoints that don't request Fields=MediaSources), looks up the actual sources from the library to make the visibility decision.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Filters.MediaSourceResultFilter.IsConfiguredIntroPath(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a file path is a configured intro video (policy or default). Intro videos must always be playable regardless of user policy.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Plugin
member.summary: Quality Gate plugin for Jellyfin. Restricts users to specific media versions based on policies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the current plugin instance.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.PluginServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers plugin services with the dependency injection container.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Providers.QualityGateIntroProvider
member.summary: Provides custom intro videos based on user quality policies. When a user is under a policy with a custom intro path, that intro is added to Jellyfin's intro list. Note: Jellyfin aggregates all registered IIntroProvider results, so if the built-in "Local Intros" plugin is also enabled its intros will play in addition to this one. Disable "Local Intros" if you only want Quality Gate intros.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Providers.QualityGateIntroProvider._introIdCache
member.summary: Cache of intro paths → DB item IDs to avoid redundant lookups/registrations. Also used by the result filter to skip filtering for intro video playback.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Providers.QualityGateIntroProvider._seriesIntroShown
member.summary: Tracks which (userId, seriesId) pairs have already seen the intro this session. For shows, the intro plays only on the first episode; this cache ensures subsequent episodes skip it even before Jellyfin's UserData is updated.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Providers.QualityGateIntroProvider.IsRegisteredIntro(System.Guid)
member.summary: Checks whether an item ID belongs to a registered intro video. Used by to skip policy filtering on intro playback requests.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Providers.QualityGateIntroProvider.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.ILibraryManager,MediaBrowser.Model.IO.IFileSystem,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.IMediaSourceManager,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.IUserDataManager)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Providers.QualityGateIntroProvider.ShouldSkipIntro(MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem,Jellyfin.Database.Implementations.Entities.User)
member.summary: Determines whether the intro should be skipped for this playback. Movies: skip if user is resuming (has playback progress). Episodes: skip if user has already watched any episode of the series.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Providers.QualityGateIntroProvider.EnsureIntroRegistered(System.String)
member.summary: Ensures an intro video file is registered in Jellyfin's database. Jellyfin's ResolveIntro calls ResolvePath then GetItemById — if the video isn't in the DB, it silently discards the intro. We mirror that flow and call CreateItem when the video is missing.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService
member.summary: Service for applying quality gate policies to media access.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService.DenyAllPolicy
member.summary: Sentinel policy returned when a user override references an invalid, disabled, or deleted PolicyId. Blocks everything (fail-closed) so that admin misconfiguration cannot widen access.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService.GetUserPolicy(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the effective policy for a user. Priority: User-specific override > Default policy > No policy (full access). If a user override points to a missing or disabled policy, access is DENIED (fail-closed).
member.returns: The effective policy, or null if user has full access.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService.ResolvePath(System.String)
member.summary: Resolves a path, following symlinks to get the actual target path.
member.returns: The resolved path (symlink target), or original path if not a symlink.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService.MatchesFilenamePattern(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Matches a filename against a regex pattern with a timeout to prevent ReDoS. When is true (used for blocked-pattern checks), timeouts and invalid patterns return true so the file is blocked (fail-closed).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService.IsPathAllowed(Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a file path is allowed by the given policy. Resolves symlinks to check both original and resolved filenames.
member.returns: True if allowed, false if blocked.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService.IsSourcePlayable(Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy,System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether a media source is allowed by policy AND actually exists on disk. Dangling symlinks (e.g. pre-created 720p transcodes not yet finished) are treated as blocked. This is the single source of truth for "can this source be played" — used by the result filter, API controller, and intro provider.
member.returns: True if allowed by policy and file exists.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService.ShouldFallbackTranscode(Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Configuration.QualityPolicy,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{MediaBrowser.Model.Dto.MediaSourceInfo})
member.summary: Determines whether fallback transcoding should be used for the given policy and sources. Returns true only when the policy has FallbackTranscode enabled, the policy is not the DenyAllPolicy sentinel (misconfiguration must stay fail-closed), there are sources to play, and none of them pass the policy filter.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService.ApplyFallbackTranscode(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{MediaBrowser.Model.Dto.MediaSourceInfo})
member.summary: Returns a copy of the sources with direct play and direct stream disabled, forcing Jellyfin to transcode server-side.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService.FilterMediaSources(System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{MediaBrowser.Model.Dto.MediaSourceInfo})
member.summary: Filters media sources based on user policy.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService.CanAccessPath(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a user can access a specific file path.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.QualityGate.Services.QualityGateService.HasFullAccess(System.Guid)
member.summary: Checks if a user has full access (no restrictions).
member.returns: True if user has full access.
